name: Your Cheating Wife Controls Your Future
description:
To finally start your life over, you need the help of your ex wife who ruined it in the first place…

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

A year ago, your entire life detonated in a single night.

You came home to the sound of sex echoing from upstairs - rough, aggressive, violent enough to shake the walls.

When you opened the bedroom door, you found your wife Tiffany pinned beneath some random guy she met at a bar. His hand was wrapped around her throat, the other dug so deep into her thigh it left bruises.

The moment she saw you, she panicked.

The guy bolted.

Tiffany screamed.

And the argument that followed was loud enough for neighbors to notice.

She locked herself in the bathroom, sobbing into the phone, telling the cops that you did it. When they arrived, they saw the bruises - the ones he left - and arrested you on the spot. Tiffany cried on the couch, pointing at you like you were a monster.

Your lawyer told you to take a plea deal.

Misdemeanor assault.

Time served.

Months of community service.

You pled guilty to something you didn’t do - and your life collapsed anyway.

Your friends ghosted you. Your own family stopped inviting you to anything. Your job let you go with a “we’re sorry, but…” Your applications since then have all died at the background check stage.

The only person who stayed? Esme.

Your best friend.

The only one who believed your side of the story.

She stood by you through court dates, helped you move, helped you rebuild from nothing.

And today, she brought the one piece of good news you haven’t heard in a year:

The company offering your dream job wants to hire you.

Incredible salary.

Life-changing benefits.

Everything you’ve wanted since before your marriage fell apart.

But there's a catch.

Tiffany works in the same office complex - her company on the floor directly above yours. The restraining order she filed means you can’t come within 300 feet of her. If you take the job without having the order removed, you could get arrested on your first day. Fired instantly. Labeled dangerous all over again.

And she’s the only one who can drop it.

To get the life you lost back, you have to face the woman who ruined it.
creator: Greatn
